description: Paper-trading track record — 100% SIMULATED. No real money, no wallet, no keys. Prices via the assistant's WebSearch (no user API keys used).

rules.marking: each 'go', open positions are marked to current prices; realized on close
rules.caveat: WebSearch prices carry meaningful source noise; same-day marks are dominated by noise, not real moves. Wide-dispersion names (e.g. INJ) are unreliable to track this way.

weekly_basket.thesis: 3-coin research basket. Backdrop unfavorable: Bitcoin Season (Alt Season Index 39/100).

open_positions.name: Pudgy Penguins
open_positions.note: Marked same-day; mostly noise. Real meme weakness on the week.

open_positions.name: Bonk
open_positions.note: BONK genuinely soft (-23% 7d); entry quote was on the high side.

open_positions.name: Injective
open_positions.note: UNRELIABLE: entry anchored to high quote-cluster (~$7.1), now reading low cluster (~$5.1). This -28% is mostly a WebSearch data artifact, not a real move. WebSearch is too noisy to track INJ honestly.

closed_trades.note: Marked with ~no elapsed time; within source noise.

history_note: Go #4 (2026-06-01): marked basket. PENGU -9.0%, BONK -19.8%, INJ -28.0% (INJ largely a data artifact). Equity $9,399.56. Same-day marks = noise; real review ~2026-06-08.
